reasoning: Today's ride focuses on addressing your lactate clearance limiter, evident from the drop between your 5-min and 20-min power outputs. By targeting over-unders today, we can directly work on your aerobic base and fatigue resistance, setting you up to hold strong on challenging segments like the Alpine Loop. Given your recent workload from yesterday's ride and the recovering TSS trend, we'll hit just below full intervals to maintain training stimulus without overreaching.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 4 sets of 9 min: 3 min at 201W - 209W, 1.5 min at 242W - 256W, 1.5 min at 201W - 209W, 3 min at 242W - 256W

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
